name: Beetrooper Sting Lancer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎甲虫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ビートルーパー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スティンギー・ランス
desc: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Insect monster in your GY and 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, place the targeted monsters on the bottoms of the Decks. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Beetrooper" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Beetrooper Sting Lancer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Insect monster in your GY and 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, place the targeted monsters on the bottoms of the Decks. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Beetrooper" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Beetrooper Sting Lancer" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 Insect monster in your GY and 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, and if you do, place the targeted monsters on the bottoms of the Decks. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Beetrooper" Spell/Trap from your Deck to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Beetrooper Sting Lancer" once per turn.

action: Places cards from the player's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
Places cards from the opponent's Graveyard on the bottom of the Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
